# Deploy Summit Finance on Railway

Modern invoicing created by kugie.app, designed for small businesses.

[![Deploy on Railway](https://railway.com/button.svg)](https://railway.com/deploy/x5njSj)

## About

Deploy Summit Finance to Railway with one-click and get your invoicing system running in under 3 minutes. Includes PostgreSQL database, MinIO storage, and web application.

Summit Finance runs on Railway's cloud infrastructure providing:
- Automatic scaling for growing invoice volumes
- Managed PostgreSQL with automated backups
- MinIO object storage for attachments
- SSL certificates and enterprise security
- 99.9% uptime guarantee

## What gets deployed

| Service | Source | Type |
|---------|--------|------|
| minio-console | [railwayapp-templates/minio-console](https://github.com/railwayapp-templates/minio-console) | Web service |
| MinIO | `minio/minio:latest` | Database |
| summit | [kugie-app/summit](https://github.com/kugie-app/summit) (root: /) | Web service |
| Slack Webhook | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.10` | Worker |
| Postgres | `ghcr.io/railwayapp-templates/postgres-ssl:16` | Database |

## Environment variables

| Variable | Service | Default | Description |
| --------- | ------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `PORT` | minio-console | 9090 | - |
| `PASSWORD` | minio-console | (secret) | - |
| `USERNAME` | minio-console | (secret) | - |
| `CONSOLE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN` | minio-console | - | The public service or customer domain. |
| `MINIO_ROOT_USER` | MinIO | (secret) | - |
| `MINIO_PUBLIC_PORT` | MinIO | 443 | - |
| `MINIO_PRIVATE_PORT` | MinIO | 9000 | - |
| `MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD` | MinIO | (secret) | - |
| `MINIO_USE_SSL` | summit | true | - |
| `DISABLE_SIGNUP` | summit | 0 | - |
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `MINIO_ACCESS_KEY` | summit | your-minio-access-key | generate your access key through minio console |
| `MINIO_SECRET_KEY` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `RESEND_FROM_NAME` | summit | Summit | - |
| `MINIO_BUCKET_NAME` | summit | summit | Please modify this with your MinIO bucket name after you create it through console |
| `RESEND_FROM_EMAIL` | summit | your@email.com | - |
| `XENDIT_SECRET_KEY` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `CLIENT_AUTH_SECRET` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED` | summit | 1 | - |
| `RECURRING_TRANSACTIONS_API_KEY` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `XENDIT_CALLBACK_VERIFICATION_TOKEN` | summit | (secret) | - |
| `XENDIT_CALLBACK_VERIFICATION_TOKEN` | Slack Webhook | (secret) | - |
| `POSTGRES_DB` | Postgres | railway | Default database created when image is started. |
| `DATABASE_URL` | Postgres | - | URL to connect to Postgres database. |
| `POSTGRES_USER` | Postgres | (secret) | User to connect to Postgres DB |
| `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` | Postgres | (secret) | Password to connect to DB |
| `DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL` | Postgres | - | Public URL to connect to Postgres database, used by the Data panel. |

## Configuration

- **Start command:** `/bin/sh -c "exec console server --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT"`
- **Networking:** Public domain with automatic HTTPS
- **Start command:** `/bin/sh -c "exec minio server --address [::]:$MINIO_PRIVATE_PORT $RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH"`
- **Volume:** `/data`
- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **TCP Proxies:** 5432
- **Volume:** `/var/lib/postgresql/data`

**Category:** Other · **Languages:** Dockerfile, TypeScript, JavaScript, Shell, CSS

[View on Railway →](https://railway.com/deploy/x5njSj)
